title: Configurable TaskStage indicators driven by Tactus procedure YAML
description:
Implement end-to-end support for procedure-defined TaskStage progress indicators in the Plexus dashboard.

## Problem

The dashboard was showing hardcoded stages (Evaluation, Hypothesis, Test, Insights) for all procedures instead of the stages declared in the optimizer YAML (setup, baseline, optimize, finalize).

## Solution

Four-file fix:
1. procedures.py: Parse stages from YAML, build stage_configs, pass to create_procedure()
2. mcp_transport.py: Add _advance_task_to_stage_by_name() helper + plexus_set_procedure_stage MCP tool
3. service.py: Inject task_id from options into experiment_context before MCP server creation
4. procedure_executor.py: Stage shim calls Tool.get('plexus_set_procedure_stage') on Stage.set()

## Effect

Stage.set('setup'/'baseline'/'optimize'/'finalize') in Lua now updates dashboard TaskStage records in real-time.

## Validation

Run 10 should show: Setup -> Baseline -> Optimize -> Finalize in dashboard.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verified working in run 10. Dashboard task 74eb7306 shows correct stages: Setup (COMPLETED) -> Baseline (RUNNING) -> Optimize (PENDING) -> Finalize (PENDING). Stage transitions fire in real-time via plexus_set_procedure_stage MCP tool called from the Stage shim in procedure_executor.py.
